failedAssertions.reason: Event detail page exceeded viewport width by 1px at mobile size.
A directly tested event detail ID returned 'Event not found', so not all tested event-detail functionality behaved cleanly.
Basketball cards did not present the distinctive polished card treatment required by the assertion.
Concert cards lacked the specified imagery and overlay-based visual treatment.
Expected styled order cards with thumbnails, price, and badges were not visible in the tested mobile flows.
Event detail lacked the specified full-width hero image and also overflowed horizontally by 1px.
